_comment: Alchemy Factory Dispatch Portal contracts. dailyMaxBase = per-portal daily cap at Negotiation level 0; effective = dailyMaxBase * (1 + 0.25*negotiation). unitsPerMin to saturate = effectiveDailyMax / dayLengthMin (base day 16 min). reward is in copper (per contract of unitsPerContract items). Source: codex contracts-calculator data attrs + user. Early Access v0.5.x — values may change.
